title: Laser Spirit Level, Multipurpose Laser Measure Tool, Spirit Level Standard Metric Ruler Measuring Tape for Photos Frame Picture Hanging 8ft/2.5M (1 Pack)
features: 3 Line Mode: Horizontal line, vertical line, and cross line by adjusting the position of the Laser emission port by up,mid and down, which meets your different measurement needs

Multipurpose tool: Laser level works for straight, vertical, or crossing lines in any setting., 8ft tape measure, standard metric ruler, a triple-positioned leveling bubble combined into one tool to save your toolbox space
3 Way Bubbles: 45 degree level bubble, horizontal level bubble, vertical level bubble. Bubble with LED Light could be used at dark
2.5m/8ft Tape Measure: 8ft Tape measure includes linear measurement of metric and inch accuracy. The dedicated reset button on the back of laser level can lock the length and quickly retract the tape

Wide Applications: The Laser Spirit Level Measure Ruler Reusable Tool Kit is a versatile and reliable tool designed for measuring and levelling in various DIY projects. This tool kit includes a laser spirit level, a measure ruler, and a wall line to make tasks such as hanging picture frames, installing shelves, and tiling floors easier and more efficient
description: Laser Level: Your All-in-One Precision Measurement Assistant Tired of Cluttered Toolboxes and Inaccurate Measurements? Say goodbye to the hassle of carrying multiple tools! Ordinary rulers, spirit levels, tape measures, and laser devices take up valuable space and are inconvenient to transport. Our multi-function Laser Level combines all these essentials into one compact, portable device—saving space and simplifying your work. **Perfect for Precision Tasks:** Whether you're hanging pictures, installing shelves, assembling cabinets, laying tiles, or positioning wallpaper and frames, this laser level delivers the accuracy you need for professional-quality results every time. **Key Features:** ✅ **3 Versatile Line Modes** Adapt to any scenario requiring straight lines or precise measurements with ease. ✅ **3-in-1 Multifunctional Design** Combines a laser level, an 8ft tape measure, a standard metric ruler, and a triple-position leveling bubble—all in one smart tool. ✅ **Safe & Efficient Laser Beam** Emits horizontal or vertical laser beams with an output of less than 0.5mW—completely harmless to health. ✅ **Dual Measurement System** Features an 8-foot measuring tape with both imperial and metric units, scaled down to 1/32 inch and 1 mm for ultra-precision. **Specifications:** - Colour: Black - Dimensions: 185 x 62 x 28 mm - Laser Output: 0.5mW - Net Weight: 120g - Batteries Required: 3 x AG13 Button Cells (included) **Important Tips:** ⚠️ Laser Radiation – Avoid direct eye exposure. ⚠️ Not a toy – Keep away from children under 14. ⚠️ Storage – Protect from water, dust, and direct sunlight. ⚠️ Accuracy Note – Please note that minor measurement variances may occur under certain conditions.
